title: Campaign Health
notes: Per-campaign quality grouped by strategic priority. The full report is a private DM to Kelsey; this tab is its visual companion. Bi-monthly (15th + 28th, month-to-date). Per-month entry shape: { period, label, verdict, total, groups[], campaigns[], flags[] }. CAVEAT: contacts + HIH are GROSS list-membership counts — a contact in multiple campaign lists is counted in each, so group/total sums are not deduplicated. Reset for SY26-27 campaign rotation on 2026-07-13.

placeholder.message: Campaign health data will appear here after the first SY26-27 run (expected July 28, 2026).
